data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for real-time availability sync to Google.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for real-time availability sync to Google, but the provided evidence does not include any checks or confirmations related to this specific requirement. While there are multiple passed steps indicating successful bookings and configurations, none of them address the real-time availability sync, which is critical for confirming the requirement. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a definitive conclusion regarding the requirement's satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence of real-time availability sync to Google.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
